title: Mitrovica, Mitrovica — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mitrovica, Mitrovica: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mitrovica is a city in Mitrovica with a population of 46,000. A city in northern Kosovo on the Ibar River, known for its mining history (Trepča Mines), the Ibar Bridge, and its diverse ethnic communities.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
